## [00:00 - 01:13]

So you're going to build a course or maybe you have a course and it's time to take it to the next level. Either way, congratulations. There could be nothing more transformative or transformational than creating a course because once you create it, it's transformative to you because you could sell it over and over and over again and never have to recreate it. Simultaneously, it's transformative to everybody who gets that valuable wisdom to shorten the gap from where they are to where they want to be. Listen, I honestly believe everyone should have a course and so does our instructor for this segment of the Mastermind Business System. In a minute, I'm going to introduce you to Lane Amon. She's the Director of Content here at Mastermind. Everything we do, including this system, including the new courses on mastermind.com, all go through her. Heck, when we did the course with Matthew McConaughey, she was the one that sat right next to me while we were with Matthew pulling out and extracting his knowledge and creating it into the course called Road Trip. I couldn't think of anyone more qualified or better to teach you how to create a course than Lane. Here she is.
